title: Ore Variants
body:
![logo](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/844299726518091776/1046342916349632563/Ore_Variants.png)

This resource packs adds some more variation into ores
I always thought that every single ore having the same texture for every single block being quite boring, so i decided to do something about it.
But why? I had nothing better to do.
Ore Variants has mod support for a lot of mods.

MOD SUPPORT:
- Oh The Biomes You'll Go
- BetterNether
- BetterEnd
- Cinderscapes
- Universal Ores
- Quark
- Enderscape
- Paradise Lost
- Randomite Classic
- Shret Nether
- Druidcraft
- Caves and Cliffs Backport
- Gems and Crystals
- More Ore Stones
- Create
- Oreganized
- Stalwart Dungeons
- Galosphere
- Sully's Mod
- LieOnLion's Enderite
- Aether
- Deeper Nether Biomes
- Infernal Expansion
- Deeper and Darker
- Sulfur and Potassium - More Gunpowder
- Deep Aether
- Aether: Redux
- Ancient Aether
- Alex's Caves

EXTERNAL LINKS:
- Curseforge Link:
